segments.text: It's very nice to see all of you here, so many
from Australia. To worship Shiva, Sadashiva
I think this is a very important occasion
it' s important because
SadaShiva the God Almighty
who Is One
He's expressed on your heart as Spirit, the Shiva
We have understand that
So many people came on this earth at different times, in different countries and they talked
to different peoples about righteousness that is dharma.
About how to elevate yourself?
And all of them have said you've got to be reborn – that's it!
You need become the spirit.
They have all said the same thing because they knew without attention is filled with
a light of Spirit, you will not be able to understand spirituality.
You had this spirit within which it's always in a witness state.
Why all the religions have failed, because they did not get their Self-realization.
They didn't become a Spirit."
So there's tremendous difference between you and others who profess some religion – it
looks as if that are hypocrites!
The intellectualize is as we know explain very well but you can see very clearly
that they haven't absorbed spirituality.
That absorption was impossible without Self-realization,
this everybody felt.
Buddha went to these limits and Mahavira both
who say that forget about God
Forget About God Almighty
you just get yourself your self realization
So there are called as atheists, Riksharwadi
They don´t believe in Ishvara
But they felt that the way people are just talking about God Almighty and what books
have said. These books also speak of righteousness, except in some books there has been some
sort interference but most them speaks spirituality – And What you have to achieve? What is
the purpose of religion.
All that is spoken very well, written very well – they'll tell you have to be this
and then there's a lot more.
This isn't good or not so even in the first step where dharma has been established
was not established when people are supposed to cheat each other with justice, collectivity
There has to be love and understanding, no jealousies ,no hypocrisy where it's a different
race.
A different community we can call as the different civilization is to be created . Everybody
claims that they are chosen ones but there just say this tremendous achievement of Sahaja
is that they have achieved the state of Spirit.
So now you can absorb dharma without any difficulties,
You would not like to cheat anyone
or kill anybody
Or be violent with others
You will stick on to truth
Very few people can stick onto the truth
Then you are not people who is going to rob others.
You have no intention at all, don't come into your mind
that we're tempted
take away things from other's
first ofall which the most important thing
That
We'll have a rapport with God Almighty
That you are in a way, in awe about God.
There is awe not I would say fear because
Fear all dispelled there's no more fear for you
But You have awe
For God that Is God Almighty
We won't cheat people
we wont cheat Sahaja Yoga
or money
You won't fight for power or something that is material, all your attention will be towards
the expansion of Your awareness in light to Spirit.
This is a vision from your Mother because Shiva is just a witness, Sadashiva is just
witnessing this play and He doesn' have any visions about it but now he must
have lots of hopes after seeing the kind
people that are created out of Sahaja Yoga.
Very unique, very beautiful
wonderful angel-like
People having been created
Now only problem is
That you've to keep
To your Angelic
Foundations
But I find
Sometimes it happens
Doesn't matter
You fall
And falter
Again
you rise into your awareness and try to locate the new dimensions that are available
To You, That we can find out. All this is possible because now
We belong really to The Chosen One's race
You must know also that you are very special people.
It is not realized sometimes by Sahaja Yogis, they have no self-esteem as to what
They've got here – once your has a self esteem
then will be the wisdom to understand
What's Your role in this lifetime?
This self esteem only possible if
If you see other people who are lost in the mire of nonsense, now You're a special community
I said.
You Are The One Who Is Going To Create That Great Community.
Now whatever are dharma's points or we can say dharmas' aspects?
You can imbibe them sahaj.
Sahaja has a very special meaning, spontaneously you do not have to exert
–you don't need go into penance or work it out in the sahaja way
–sahaja also means easy
and having your heart all these qualities without any difficulty what so ever
It's the easiest thing for you to be righteous than, and it is easier if you are honest.
So this speciality that we have got is a vision of all the saints ,of all the prophets
of all the seers, of all the incarnations is you.
There are lectures and lectures people give
– You must do like this…you must that way!
They think by educating into these principles
they will be alright …they cannot
If we try to educate them
it would go as an ego in their heads
because if get educated only through your ego
It's not sahaj
is not sahaj sustenance, sahaja dharana.
It's something that has been put on to you from outside
but for your it very easy
That
You can imbibe all the aspects of Dharma
Very easily
Don't have do anything
We will just don't
I've known people who used take drugs
who used to abuse people, beat and this one fellow he said he used to carry a revolver
always with him.
He's become such quiet silent beautiful person that unbelievable but his wife tells
me was like these so now you are the special people
And those
People who have not got their Realization cannot get to dharma easily.
Then the second point which is very easy for you,
Is
To love another person
–to care of other persons
It's a very easy thing
You would like that
You would love to care for people who are Sahaja Yogis, also you're non-Sahaja Yogies.
Sahaj Yoga is quite flexible if see somebody
Who's a Non-Sahaja Yogi and also suffering
He will immediately jump
To seethat that person gets help from him
I've seen peepo in sahaja yoga very interesting
Yeah, one gentleman came to Me and said,"Mother I have no money.
And want go do some work for Sahaja Yoga but even if you don't have any money for
the household."
That's it all right that is very good come tomorrow i will give with a money next
day he never again as what was matter?
He says there were somebody sitting in view at time when we are talking remember
I said, �I don�t remember so clearly.� All right.
I also do not know him as soon when went out he asked how much money you want?
And told me at least this much and immediately took the money to give it back
So who haven't got something in Sahaja Yoga that hasn´t gotten any
Immediately we ran for help like you would be amazed there are these six countries
like Romania, Bulgaria Russia Poland, Czechoslovakia all these countries even Hungary have been
helped by one country or other.
Even the East Asian Countries are help by Australians I never told them ,I never asked
and they were said that you just came forward that Mother somehow we have to help them
We'll arrange, we will get to them.
Will manage this?
It's very surprising how they could just think of helping those countries
then the made tickets for them
They brought him into India
and looked after
Russians came to india
were looked after
Everybody was so full
Of compassion
And love
But without feeling
They have done anything without feeling in any way that they've done any obligation
to someone.
Nobody expected them, thank them and write letters of thanks or anything!
Whatever is done it's finished now – nobody ever asked how much money was given?
How much we had spent…
Nothing like the kind at that spur-of moment everybody come forward give their money
And the thing worked out.
It was very surprising, for example France is looking after Romania I didn't know they
had done so much of work in Romania and suddenly I found 125 Romanians there my heart really
filled with such joy but how are you here?
French have arranged everything for us Mother, really!
There were no French people then No one from France
And Romanians were singing so well that the Indians felt, oh wow what is this a new group
has started.
All of them and they never used books without using their books as they were singing these
Romanian's.
So I said where are you going to stay in night?
We'll say garden mother it all right but how we will stay there doesn't matter
How secretly they help if had not asked then would have known how come here
So this, to help the people who do not have – we can call them sort of a…
We say those are poorer than us.
I've seen also how individually they look after others
and bring things for their friends' presence
And beautiful thing just
For there own satisfaction
Not too oblige anyone or too later on
say, oh I brought this sari for you – nothing. Just to see that sari on another such a way
is so beautiful thing! Imagine these countries like England France Spain Italy Switzerland
very aggressive people when they went out not help anyone but to establish their empire
or destroy the people and convert them all kinds of things in name religion
in the name of God, but when you go to other countries
You just want help? Give them all that is needed.
I am myself amazed how it works out so spontaneous
In your heart
That we should do this and work It out
This transformation has taken place within
Has brought about all the beauty
Of Your Heart
Of Your Compassion
And Love
And you want to give security to others without expecting anything,
with out demanding it and then all enjoy doing that.
Living in a simple place like this under the tent sitting listening
me we don't want any comfort just seek
the comfort of your spirit and enjoy the whole place,
nature. Gradually I've seen also Sahaja Yogis
are becoming extremely conscious
on their ecological problem all over them. They have started using
things which is natural or artistic
It's something so surprising that suddenly they have taken to
artistically. I know a gentleman
who had arms, ammunitions in his house or everything like that.
But now he has beautiful things – of course the arms and ammunition are one side
but such beautifully artistic thing is collected
so I said how did you get this? See Mother
i was thinking
That You would to see them when we feel happy
So I bought for you
To see
And if want can take anything
and said, I don't want anything. You can keep it yourself.' So this generosity we
call it audarya is the sign of an incarnation but these generosities are among my own children
now that extremely generous and they enjoy giving things to others than in keeping
thing for themselves . It has happened not only Australia ,it
It has happened all over the world.
If you see the Sahaja Yogis, how they are sacrificing their time and money to spread
Sahaj Yoga ,to help others or accommodate other kinds of people within themselves.
Such wisdom such collective wisdom is there we don't have take any concessions . We
You don't have to say that you all must this or what is your opinion, will vote for it.
Everyone votes the same if somebody says alright we need some help in Bulgaria and Italy
immediately all Italians brought out their ornaments everything that mother how much
And the Bulgarians are surprised also, that what have we done for these Italians?
That they should come down all way to help us out with money every kind of thing.
So this compassion is love – it's feeling of oneness as if there part and parcel
of us, we are not separate.
For Russia you'll be surprised that they sent a television from America – now America
had nothing to do with Russian but must mean the spirit or Shri Krishna trying
to help the spirit of right agnya, must be such enthusiasm about Russia – unbelievable.
They came in buses they come on trains and went all over these places to far-fetched
place but have achieved tremendous results it's not only in Europe that working
out around their own cities, but all the way they are working in Turkey.
They're on work-in Nepal and now somebody has gone to Japan – he is actually not
a Japanese!
He's from Rio…and …he had gone into Japan as a physicist,
But he is using some sort of a pantomime show on the streets to attract people and telling
them about Sahaja Yoga. He telephoned me three, four times,"Mother you have been
in Australia so many time why don't come Japan this time?" I said all right next
time I will definitely come to Japan, I promise you. But this time am already programmed by
Sahaja Yogis so can't help it! They have fixed me up everywhere and i don' mind
because its such. To Me It comes such many people ask Me whether You are travelling
so much this thing, I never think about it.
Also the collectivity you have now is tremendous – its not only in Australia that we've
got a collectivity but other day i telephoned to someone from India and told them im buying
an ashram at Brisbane they said Mother its very great things ,we are happy for
an Indian, what is there to be happy if we buy an ashram in Brisbane?
So overjoyed about it.
To them Brisbane's the same as Bombay or Delhi – heart has become so large because
Shiva is shining here this Spirit is shining!
It had becomes such a larger heart that it encompasses whole universe I think
the way people look at it, that's why you all have become universal people.
You don't only read about Vishwanirmal Dharma –
we do not know of it through your mind
and try to follow but you've imbibed it within yourself
which is so sahaj which are unaware
how in a Sahaja Way has come to be.
Now you know Australia was full of Rishalism once upon a time, nobody allowed to come in
here.
Might be fifty years back or so but today – In Australia what change it is!
Though they talked about Christianity and all those things But They didn't think
What Christ has said?
There were just opposite of what Christianity should Islam is the same, Islam talks
of very great things.
But it has to be confessed that the Muslims have nothing do with Islam, is absolutely
from outside if you see Christianity – You'll a very funny idea about them!
If ask any Hindu gentleman about Christianity they will say there are worst possible people
Very cunning, very aggressive and it takes them no time to kill each other.
Imagine disciples of Christ!
But if you ask a Christian about Muslim he will tell you oh these Muslims are the most
quarrelsome dirtiest people ever born fundamentalist they're all fundamentalists whether its
They are a fundamentalist because they're reading one book, and that too just reading.
The Book also doesn't go – if the Book goes inside there will realize all these
books telling same thing under different names but you have got that universal thing thanks
to your Spirit which was quite intact so we started shining with it.
So, we have now a new community and New Civilization of people who are extremely honest to themselves
– honest each other.
They're extremely righteous good-people they absolutely nonviolent
absolutely law-abiding, very loving affectionate at the same time extremely constructive and
a tthe sametime very intelligent. They understand Sahaja Yoga is such as subtle subject because
you know everybody has failed to make people understands anything about truth it's impossible
But this was the trick, your spirit.
Once you're Spirit is enlightened it goes into
Your head without any difficulties – absolutely Sahaja Yoga!
You don't know how difficult Is this subject of Sahaj Yoga?
It's such a fulfillment for desire
Of The Divine that your divinity
is now expressible. When you are collective,
You're more enjoying each other
–you enjoy a collective life.
Individualism
Is against the spirit of The Whole
but we have our own varieties
where We live in Other countries
In other atmospheres
With other traditions
That's how
you are living, but among ourselves we have the same faith which is enlightened – which
not blind-faith.
Enlightened Faith firstly that You are realized souls secondly there's an All Pervading
Power.
We've got this same type of worship whether it Christ or whether it is Mohammed Sahab
or whether it is Shiva.
We all worship in the same way, we do not have a sort of difference of opinion on that
like one church becoming ten churches and one Hinduism become 10 Hinduisms –it's
We are all Sahaja Yogis and we have got the same principle, binding us in a sahaj manner.
You don't say that you need to be principled or on this principle – you are Sahaja Yogis!
You have to be there absolutely, because you just can't help it.
Because in your nature now the Spirit is shining
also
are becoming archetypes I should say
In a real sense of word
For people who arenot such
Such people
Are not available anywhere
When they see you
They will think that what model
It is what a model of life.
They don't drink, they do not smoke ,they dont boast off it and hate anyone .They love
any one.
There so dynamic there are creative their so constructive their self-contented ther
not at all competitive the cause no problem to nature because no problems to anything
They have become such beautiful people, who are these people?
Such Beautiful People Are The Models.
So now individually you've to understand this part that we Have To Be Models In This
Country Of Australia Model of Good Behaviour ,Good Language Decent Life Decorous Life
Not fighting with husband, fighting wife – you see if open any television just get a headache.
I mean there's no other theme but the husband-fighting-wife and wife-fighting-husband.
There should be wisdom about it! Fighting among yourselves…
You see so many people have gathered in a pub what will happen that bubble burst out?
They can never sit silently
The Mayor of Kavila told me, surprises Me
That in the church we are sitting for half an hour, then you start nudging each other
how long is it going to take now?
Better get out.
You'll be tired and what these people doing hours together with you!
How they so spellbound?!
They don't feel tired I think there special people as if that's all but
What do they know?
They don't do anything, they are just enjoying.
He couldn' understand that once we had a puja or guru puja for about six hours altogether
and there was surprise at how these people were sitting
And all the villages mostly their elderly
thought this angels have come from somewhere
they're angelic peoples
They don't trouble you, they don' t torture you.
The look after You and try to be kind
not only that but the try
bring joy
there were so surprised in their village
first day used call Me princess
then this started calling me goddess
Then said your Madonna whatever
could think of best
Since they started saying all those things.
They want now to come to Sahaja Yoga, but I said let us see it out after some time we
will work for them also .They are so nice by seeing how the Sahaj Yogis are because
I tell you go up ,but seen the way sahaja yogi is that land behind a house was not
even given to Prince Doryo who's willing pay lot of money becuase he wanted have
road that way, but to Me they rushed forward and at a very nominal price They gave me
the land.
He said it is for you only – please have It!
The whole village Is getting into transformation But the dedication You've got
This is very remarkable Surprises Me
Really surprises Me I never taught too much
But the way you are dedicated in everything, everyone who is not a Sahaja Yogi will be
charmed by your dedication to Sahaj Yoga.
To Me sometimes I think what have done?
Have do nothing!
You had Kundalini and Spirit that's all but such difference with little distance
And such a difference, can you imagine an Indian woman coming to Australia finding this
love and this affection?
This dedication.
Unbelievable!
They all think that I must be mesmerizing them – nobody could believe they would
have been so dedicated taking up so much trouble with so many cares…
I mean, just imagine the flowers that you have brought.
Just imagine all this You've done!
And then just imagine
The way they bought another big car
so your mother should be brought here without any difficulty
All these love
and all of this affection, this care
–I never asked for anything
If we had said to walk
We would have walked but never said no
Never expected all those things
But when He wanted to express His Love
to Me.
This dedication is so much and you sacrifice for that, really your sacrificing quite a
lot – Your time ,your effort come all the way this far off place on this puja . All
again what we have from pujas only possible when You are realized otherwise it's useless
To do any puja, any worship people go to church sing a few hymns and come back.
They are just the same – afterwards they have gone for the pub because they think
that pub is only place where you can get some joy!
One has to exert one has sacrifice though I may say that Sahaja Yoga is easiest thing
You don't need to go Himalayas or stand on your heads but still you have to sacrifice
Your time, your attention.
Formally you might be going to some rock music
You may go into some pubs also
and enjoy all these things
but have given up everything
without My telling just give it up
And now are so pure
Your attention is so pure
that can't enjoy all this
Don´t think its remarkable
This has happened
This community, I don't have to tell you.
i dont' haveto educate
and must say that all these things you've given up
suddenly I find
All of your have become so clean
So beautiful! Your chakras are so clean
Is it?
That this is your puro punyas
It's working out
But still ,I would say
You must know yourself esteem
that you are Sahaja Yogis, and how can you behave like this if you're a sahajogi?
You cannot.
Now YOU ARE a sahaji yogi so the dignity – that wisdom has to be there!
The compassion love…the unity of purpose should be there all over
world you have brothers & sisters
This brotherhood and sisterhood is everywhere
You have rocky sisters, you are very pure relationships.
Anything impure is just thrown out in a Sahaja Yoga manner those who do not fit into it
– Just get of them!
We now we've got beautiful families and children so let's think about it.
Moses saved some Jews but what good for nothing was the use to save such people?
Then Christ came and talked about this,
And This is what has happened to Christianity.
Mohammed came an talked of very nice things I must tell you
He never made it a rigid religion Never
It was Very flexible
An he said You Must get the knowledge
So according them Knowledge Was To read The book
And to interpretate
And to be an intellectual
After that Came Guru Nanak also
you know that. What has happened to Sikhs? Where they have gone? Sikh means the person
who had learnt, learned divine laws! If I say – You've got to follow the Divine
Law's how? We are not connected we don't what are the Divine Law is just following
we want to follow Divine Law now your hanging somewhere on this earth the Divine Law
are working there, how you're going to work out the Divine laws if your not connected.
But do know immediately what is the divine law?
You go against it as soon we go againsit ,you can feel on central nervous system
.You have feeling in hands that doing something against the Divine Laws.
Immediately you will know and if you alert try change think that's not correct this
the truth about myself.
You start judging yourself all of a time and you want to put your self right, because
don't like it that way."
So many ideas we have in our personal life – there should be wife who should spoil
me or husband would spoil my child… all finished now!
What do I want?
I want a real Sahaja Yogini, I want the real Sahaj Yogi to marry and after that marriage
becomes blessing.
How?
These flowers have come out – it's all innately built within you with this beauty
which just starts showing but has to sprout up these penance so called is no penance
They say we are enjoying this place, I mean it's a place for penance only the way things
here.
Here there is not even closed bathrooms – people have found rather difficult to take a bath
even!
It' s quite a penance come such far-fetched places or travel in Maharashtra as another
big penance but you enjoy them and they said that we were missing our buses?
I said, really?
You would be happy.
No no Mother we are missing…
It was an adventure for them – they liked the way that were jostled and giving hiccups
…they're very happy about it!
That all this is like a kind of an adventure . Everything which you call as tapasya or
penance becomes an adventure to him ,and their way described in very interesting
Like these musicians, they went to Russia and got lost.
And when came back then were describing the whole thing with such description as if God
was just taking them from places-to-places
– how They helped every moment
How they come
To Italy sudden
&how they came to Milan
The Ashram
The whole description is tremendous
Now think of what you have achieved
But you can't even think, You just achieve.
Without thinking your achieved things is the blessing of Your Spirit – blessing
Of Shiva!
The spirit Is a witness and You develop that witness state to You all this looks like
A funny stage where people are doing these in that politics economics
You see as something absolute. I went down to Russia, there were so many Russians
And told them that this very bad shape the politics is here now
and you are having
Very Bad times with your food no mother
They have No problem With Food or Anything
But what do we care? We've got The spiritual Food
Let These People Fight Do What we Were not Bothered
They were least bothered as there was a coup or anything, atleast bothered about it.
Let them fight!
let then do what they like."
We are in different situation – I said which situation you're on?
we Are In The Kingdom Of God, they told me.
WE ARE IN THE KINGDOM OF GOD, why should worry these kingdoms and things, let them
fight.
Such contented people so very beautiful…
You have many brothers & sisters here.
Early in the morning I got up and they had, I don't know when planted flowers on
a road of My house there.
Flowers all along – rose after rose!
And you do not know where it came from or disappeared?
So sweet actually except for crying with joy…I did no what to say if this happens
all over. What a world we can have! There are, of course some people who were exceptional
or troublesome – not alright…it's alright forget about them. So now you're
the ones that understood what is God and what Sadashiva? Now your faith in Him which
He's not blind.
You also know that His powers work, that His laws works – all other laws are useless
only His laws' works!
We have seen experienced in your lifetime how miracles taking place and things working
out?
A simple miracle I would say it was desired that Shiv Poojas should be around some
hills but they couldn't arrange them trying for another place which could
be arranged, so you are here.
You desire and it works as if your desires acts but we have some people who still mediocre
–who behave in a mediocre manner very dull–some of them are very dull-people they cannot
understand such—they don't know how much can gain out
So…you shouldn' worry about that then
And you have to think about the whole collective which is good and one or two useless people
forget them.
If they come up well, if don't we are not going force that will be getting more
More and more people, I'm sure it will happen.
But the greatest thing you have got is complete integration within your being –
Your heart ,your mind
…your liver…I should say or attention are all integrated
There's no quarrel
there' sno struggle between
heart and your mind, heart in you brain.
Whatever the brain thinks that's what it accepts whatever your heart wants is what
your brain accepts .Whatever attention is there is completely integrated with
Your Heart and with your Brain
You must see other people they don't want to do something but they have
to do it because they're habituated.
So many people told Me, we want give up this but can't – once you have got the Spirit
You get that power and then you surpass all those temptations not only temptations also
with the differentiations which We always make like This is That or This Is That
But you integrate among yourselves, you integrate amongst different states, you integrate
different countries. The whole cosmos seems to be integrated, woven and governed by the
Divine laws – this integration gives you a complete understanding of Sahaja Yoga
mentally emotionally spiritually it's not by some sort of brainwashing or bombarding
But just through the light of Spirit you have seen that truth and you've understood it.
Also, You are so many powers!
We do not want to exert –that's a different point on them– but Just try one word
prayer from You is very powerful than hundreds of prayers
Of these people One asking
Is much more powerful Than thousands
of these askings. You have never tried that, try it out! You are extremely powerful whatever
you desire works on –you've other powers giving realization also curing so many powers
but most the time will bring somebody to Me to be cured. No no there's not need
we're given all power and use them don't afraid use this powers and would be amazed
How this power work out and how you become more and more embedded in your faith,
In yourself. Of course there are Sahaja Yogis who are made to sit on the throne
but still they're begging what can You do about it?
We have so very powerful in collective
And also individual whatever we want
you can have it. I am desireless, because the Divine power is working for me everything
–I don't need to desire anything, but You've got to pray and ask. The wider
Your prayers become, they will be wider in a wider world with wider vision not limited
your children, not limited to a family – not limited to one place.
But unlimited areas will come on so we become very conscious and alert about whatever is
happening in the world put our attention there. We try find out what's wrong with
this? And What' s Wrong With That?
You are just worried of small little ashram but you're worried for whole world
to find out what's wrong, what can we do and desire.
Because if you have the power then why not work it ourselves?
We can!
So your attention goes anywhere from Nicaragua or Israel or Saddam Hussein – any place
that wants to be worked on moves its mobile universe just start expanding your heart
your mind and you're attention.
Your faith in Me, I must say is great
– am myself surprised at that!
Am quite a camouflage
it's not easy to understand me
…I don't understand Myself
On one side of course
i'm divine
on the other hand
very human
even if film
If see somebody suffering
start crying
Can't bear
I can't cure children because i cant see their sufferings, it's another aspect of
mine.
Have made myself extremely human and this divinity also is just such have done nothing
having like these and am not achieved anything if I've achieved anything its understanding
of human beings, because I always felt that all these incarnations and all this prophets
never understood the human-beings.
They've ever knew they are not enlightened people – no use talking to them about
those great things it's a waste!
It is like blind person you explain him with colors and beauty at his stage.
And so this human realization that I had is, it's so beautiful.
Now understand what the joy of bhakti?
What a joy of jnana?
What is the joy of karma?
Because a person who doesn't do anything, who's nishkriya –
A person has no bhakti and
Who have no jnana either.
Is just vacant
I had to fill in myself with all these things
That i've got know the Jnana
Not that Jnana of divine because afterall
It not difficult
If am that
I know that, but the jnana of human beings.
The problems with humans
–I had to study for years
a human being's work it out
But once he has worked
That is what He said
There is divinity in you
Has started expressing itself
